summary: Tested Global Search (7 features), Profile Fields (4 features), Report System (2 endpoints), Founding Member Badge (3 aspects), Onboarding Modal, and Empty States. Backend: 25/25 tests PASS. Frontend: All testable features verified and working.

issues: Console warnings about missing DialogTitle/aria-describedby for accessibility - consider adding VisuallyHidden DialogTitle

action_items: Minor: Add VisuallyHidden DialogTitle to GlobalSearch dialog for accessibility
seed_data_creation: Test reports created during Report System testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 major features tested and working: 1) Global Search with 3 tabs (Records/Collectors/Posts), live search, recent searches working; 2) Profile Fields (setup, location, favorite_genre) editable in Settings and displayed on Profile; 3) Founding Member badge displays on profile page and as honeycomb icon (🍯) in Hive posts; 4) Report System APIs fully functional (POST /api/reports, GET /api/reports/admin); 5) Empty State component exists in Hive; 6) Onboarding Modal exists but cannot be tested as demo user has onboarding_completed=true. To test onboarding, create a new user. Record Detail Page (Feature 5) frontend was deferred by main agent.

empty_states.hive_empty_text: the hive is just getting started. be the first to post.
